name: requirement-review-simulator
tagline: Stress-test your PRD with 5-role simulated review meetings
description: PRD review stress-test simulator for product managers. Five cross-functional roles (engineering, operations, design, executive, legal) challenge your product requirements with realistic pushback. Choose from 3 difficulty levels: Rookie (gentle), Realistic (big-tech standard), or Hell Mode (all hostile). Outputs a scored HTML survival report with 5-dimension radar chart, counterargument playbook, RACI matrix, meeting script, and action checklist.
author: Chris1Wang3
